season_weather: 暖かい。桜や新緑の季節。薄手のアウター・ニット・シャツ
casual_outfit: Pastel pink oversized cardigan, white ribbed tank top, flowy beige culottes, stylish slip-on mules, delicate gold necklace.
room_wear: soft pink spaghetti-strap camisole top, loose cream linen wide pants
pajamas: soft lavender silk-look camisole and wide-leg shorts pajama set
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: small stuffed animal sitting at the corner of the bed
room_seasonal: a small vase with pink flowers on the windowsill

afternoon.label: ゼミ
afternoon.scene: university seminar room, relief and tiredness after the presentation
afternoon.story_scene: campus hallway after seminar presentation, relieved expression, notebook under arm

evening.label: カフェ巡り
evening.scene: exploring a cozy new Tokyo cafe, latte art and warm interior
